name: First Time In Africa: Backpacking From Cape Town To Victoria Falls
original_name: First Time In Africa: Backpacking From Cape Town To Victoria Falls
overview: My first trip to Africa is a 5 week adventure through South Africa, Namibia, Botswana and Zambia. Captured in this travel documentary.
